creator: kaoru@kaisei.org
text:
Please update to 0.09.  Use this patch instead.

--- p5-Template-Provider-Encoding-0.09.patch begins here ---
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/www/p5-Template-Provider-Encoding/Makefile /tmp/p5-Template-Provider-Encoding/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/www/p5-Template-Provider-Encoding/Makefile	Mon Nov 27 11:29:15 2006
+++ /tmp/p5-Template-Provider-Encoding/Makefile	Fri Apr 20 13:25:04 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	Template-Provider-Encoding
-PORTVERSION=	0.07
+PORTVERSION=	0.09
 CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	Template
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/www/p5-Template-Provider-Encoding/distinfo /tmp/p5-Template-Provider-Encoding/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/www/p5-Template-Provider-Encoding/distinfo	Mon Nov 27 11:29:15 2006
+++ /tmp/p5-Template-Provider-Encoding/distinfo	Fri Apr 20 13:25:11 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (Template-Provider-Encoding-0.07.tar.gz) = 6defb77d4d802fb87cc741e13f2d3f55
-SHA256 (Template-Provider-Encoding-0.07.tar.gz) = b5e21a9f1ebc1319f1f99e0a35767735e5436aa8ff10b29a49ec64b6a442cf02
-SIZE (Template-Provider-Encoding-0.07.tar.gz) = 4034
+MD5 (Template-Provider-Encoding-0.09.tar.gz) = a2af735582d141d49810f1ede78d4da3
+SHA256 (Template-Provider-Encoding-0.09.tar.gz) = 1e9cb7ce78b7c1e3403de00012ca7ded412eda451f75462e33b1beff23699cdf
+SIZE (Template-Provider-Encoding-0.09.tar.gz) = 4320
--- p5-Template-Provider-Encoding-0.09.patch ends here ---
